title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India

jsonLd.title: Junior Frontend Developer at Microsoft India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Microsoft India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microsoft India:
Microsoft India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microsoft India!
